title: Feature: Restore full vanilla HTML feature parity to React app

steps.description: Rewrite SpecInput with URL fetch input, file drag-drop zone, editor info (file size + version), and line numbers
steps.done_condition: SpecInput renders URL input + Fetch button, drag-drop overlay, file size/version info. Vite builds clean.

steps.description: Create synced scroll hook and diff-aware line highlighting hook + EditorOverlay component
steps.done_condition: useSyncedScroll syncs two refs. useDiffHighlight maps results to line numbers. EditorOverlay renders colored line backgrounds.

steps.description: Create MigrationGuide component with timeline, progress bar, severity-colored change cards, checklist with localStorage persistence, code example tabs, and Markdown export
steps.done_condition: MigrationGuide renders timeline dots, progress bar, change cards with checklists. Export downloads .md file. Checklist state persists in localStorage.

steps.description: Wire all new components into DiffViewer: integrate SpecInput with synced scroll and diff overlay, add Guide tab navigation, add guide generation form, connect MigrationGuide component, add path click handler to scroll editors
steps.done_condition: DiffViewer has Compare/Guide tab switching, synced scroll editors with diff highlighting, guide generation form, path click scrolls editors. Vite builds clean.

steps.description: Final integration test: verify all 12 specs, Vite build, backend tests still pass, no XSS violations
steps.done_condition: All 51 backend tests pass. Vite build succeeds. Manual verification of all 12 spec behaviors.

successCriteria: URL fetch works in both editors
File drag-drop shows overlay and loads content
Changed lines are highlighted in editors
Migration guide shows timeline, progress, checklist
Path click in table scrolls editors
Provider sidebar auto-compares on version select
